mapper.update:
update commodity
commodity_name = #{commodityName},
commodity_price = #{commodityPrice},
commodity_discounted_price = #{commodityDiscountedPrice},
category_id = #{categoryId},
oversold_configurations = #{oversoldConfigurations},
oversold = #{oversold},
inventory = #{inventory},
alarm_threshold = #{alarmThreshold},
`description` = #{description},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
available_status = #{availableStatus},
update_user = #{updateUser},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id, commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category, is_deleted, status, available_status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from commodity where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select distinct category_id from commodity where category_id in
#{item}
mapper.insert: insert into commodity(id,commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category, is_deleted, status, available_status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{commodityName}, #{commodityPrice}, #{commodityDiscountedPrice}, #{categoryId}, #{oversoldConfigurations}, #{oversold}, #{inventory}, #{alarmThreshold}, #{description}, #{category}, #{isDeleted}, #{status}, #{availableStatus}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into commodity(id,commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category, is_deleted, status, available_status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.commodityName}, #{entity.commodityPrice}, #{entity.commodityDiscountedPrice}, #{entity.categoryId}, #{entity.oversoldConfigurations}, #{entity.oversold}, #{entity.inventory}, #{entity.alarmThreshold}, #{entity.description}, #{entity.category}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.availableStatus}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into commodity(id,commodity_name, commodity_price, commodity_discounted_price, category_id, oversold_configurations, oversold, inventory, alarm_threshold, description, category, is_deleted, status, available_status, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.commodityName}, #{entity.commodityPrice}, #{entity.commodityDiscountedPrice}, #{entity.categoryId}, #{entity.oversoldConfigurations}, #{entity.oversold}, #{entity.inventory}, #{entity.alarmThreshold}, #{entity.description}, #{entity.category}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.availableStatus}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update commodity_name = values(commodity_name), commodity_price = values(commodity_price), commodity_discounted_price = values(commodity_discounted_price), category_id = values(category_id), oversold_configurations = values(oversold_configurations), oversold = values(oversold), inventory = values(inventory), alarm_threshold = values(alarm_threshold), description = values(description), category = values(category), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), status = values(status), available_status = values(available_status), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
